title: Prompt injection — how attackers manipulate AI through crafted inputs

artifact_plan.diagram_intent: Flow contrast: two labeled inputs (TRUSTED system prompt, UNTRUSTED user input) merging into a single context-window box feeding the LLM, output marked hijacked/manipulated; small split showing direct (user→window) vs indirect (web page/document→window) sources of the malicious instruction. Mermaid flowchart.
artifact_plan.suggested_profile_signals: mid-length descriptive title (not single noun); Core Concepts 6 beginner-tight sub-concepts (not system-level); one contrast (direct vs indirect) + injection-vs-jailbreak comparison; no pipeline/framework/algorithm; cross_refs just LLM reuse; mid-week budget pressure favors standard.

depth_signals: Standard — 6 beginner-tight sub-concepts, contrast + comparison structure, no system-level pipeline; reading ~1200-1600w; diagram for the shared-context-window contrast.
